chapter_title.en: Chapter on Judging by the Testimony of Two Women and the Oath of the Claimant

text: 3320 - رَوَى مَنْصُورُ بْنُ حَازِمٍ أَنَّ أَبَا اَلْحَسَنِ مُوسَى بْنَ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "إِذَا شَهِدَ لِطَالِبِ اَلْحَقِّ اِمْرَأَتَانِ وَ يَمِينَهُ فَهُوَ جَائِزٌ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.3320 - Mansur ibn Hazim narrated that Abu al-Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as), said: "If two women testify in favor of the claimant along with his oath, it is permissible."
